prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: db_872 Product Type: HOME Brand (from catalog): Heeper Existing Title: Universal Tool Forged Steel Cats Paw Carpenters 15" Heavy Duty Flat Nail Puller Description: The Universal Tool 15" Flat Nail Puller is a great addition to any tool collection. This nail puller is constructed of forged steel, has a width of 35mm and is 6mm thick.

Nail pullers are an essential carpenter's tool, specially designed to grip nail heads. This nail puller is essential for demolition work, but it will tear up the wood around the nail head so it is not recommended for finish work.

Make sure to grab one of these before your next home improvement or woodworking project.

Package Includes:
-(1) 15" Nail Puller Search Terms: hobby tool home garage woodworking Features: - Forged Steel - Essential Carpenter's Tool - Ideal for Gripping & Removing Nails - Great for Demolition Work - Length: 15 inch | 38.1 cm === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Heeper 15" Forged Steel Cats Paw Nail Puller

tokens.name: Forged Steel Cats Paw Nail Puller

anthropic.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Forged Steel, Carpenter's Essential Tool, Ideal For Demolition And Nail Removal

openai.title_differentiation: Forged Steel, Heavy Duty Demolition, Grips Nails Securely, 35Mm Wide, 6Mm Thick, Carpentry Essential
